summary: Refactored LoadTestDashboard from a 1606-line monolith into a 157-line orchestration component with presentational panels, hooks, and helpers under src/components/admin/load-test-dashboard/.
changed: Extracted formatters, status classes, result upsert, and real backend phase normalization.
Extracted synthetic scenario controls, run status, real backend panel, metric cards, diagnostics panels, and results table.
Extracted synthetic browser-run orchestration into hooks/useSyntheticLoadTestRunner.ts.
Extracted real backend start/stop/poll orchestration into hooks/useRealBackendRun.ts.
Extracted diagnostics state and metric-row derivation into hooks/useDiagnosticsPolling.ts.
intentionallyNotChanged: No labels, button text, data-testid values, or literal aria-label values changed.
No unrelated admin components, backend code, API code, or load-test library code changed.

validations.command: PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 BACKEND_PUBLISH_PORT=18080 npx playwright test tests/admin-load-test-dashboard.spec.ts --workers=1

validations.details: 5 existing warnings outside changed source files

validations.command: PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 BACKEND_PUBLISH_PORT=18080 npm run test:e2e:exhaustive
validations.details: 603 passed, 9 skipped, 0 latency budget failures, 62 warnings

risks: The targeted Vitest suite does not render LoadTestDashboard itself, but Playwright browser coverage was run after the hook extraction.
RealBackendLoadTestPanel.tsx is the largest extracted presentational file and may warrant future subdivision if it grows.
useSyntheticLoadTestRunner.ts is 349 lines and can be split later if browser synthetic scenarios gain more branches.
recommendation: Accept this behavior-preserving refactor and consider adding a lightweight render test in a later hardening slice.
